title: Job Openings at Bell OIl and Gas Limited
content:
Bell OIl and Gas Limited is a leadingindigenous oilfield services company, dedicated to consistently proffering solutions, driving local content development and capacity building in Nigeria.

We offer an extensive range of high quality professional services to clients across the facets of oil and gas industry and other industries.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Supply Base Company Site Representative

Job Locations: Port Harcourt and Onne - Rivers
Employment Type: Contract

Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Achieve safe operations (Goal Zero), i.e., No Harm & No Leaks and No Ethical Breaches, acting as Company Representative on site.
	Responsible for driving team compliance with the Goal Zero, IOGP Life Saving Rules, Safe Work Process, Permit Compliance/Tracking and other extant regulations while delivering on business targets in a responsible manner.
	Responsible for verifying the company’s material handling and port facilities management performance in line with contract at Supply Base, safely, ethically, and transparently. Interpret Official Cargo manifest for all vessel shipment from supply base to offshore and vice versa.
	Provide good safety leadership and sustain awareness for effective frontline work execution at the supply base/jetty.
	Sustain barrier strengthening and effective management of transport risks as the Site Transport Risks Focal Point at the Supply Base frontline.
	Provide effective representation of the company’s interest while managing risks and delivering value to the business at the supply base.
	Ensure timely provision of Logistics and Supply Base Support in engagements, meeting the regularly changing demand of the various offshore assets.
	Support enhanced business planning and performance management for the Supply Base operations and actively track actions to close-out. Collate weekly/monthly reports and KPI dashboard.
	Maintain effective interface between the Marine Operations, Quality Assurance and Resource Optimization in resolving key constraints within the Supply Chain and Logistics value chain.
	Ensure strict compliance with the company procurement guidelines for all supplies and service provision to the supply base. Be aware and comply with subcontracting guidelines.
	Ensure proper storage, packaging, and preservation of materials in transit and storage.
	Responsible for all inbound and outbound material movement and shipment onto/off vessel ensuring optimization of Supply Base Operations. Maintain the inventory as well as perform yard supervision.
	Effectively track and manage equipment request and optimization to reduce cost and maximize value to the business. Track integrity status of equipment.
	Review all material handling activities via Job Sheet verification for effective cost control.
	Drive initiatives for continuous process improvement and integrate HSSE awareness into every facet of the material handling and storage operations.
	Prioritize safe, efficient planning and safe execution of all lifting and hoisting operations in line with company Lifting & Hoisting guideline.
	Supervise and ensure daily stakeholder requests are properly addressed.
	Maintain effective supervision over the offshore cargo carrying units request and supply to prevent value erosion in the supply chain. Maintain records of all cargo carry units and ensure they are certified and in compliance with recommended current lifting colour code and other relevant QA/QC activities. Support cargo carrying unit contract management by ensuring optimal utilization and quick turnaround.


Qualifications
The contractor staff must possess the following required qualifications:


	BSc / BEng / BTech in Social Science, Science, Management or Engineering, with a minimum of 3 years of experience in Supply Base Management or HND with a minimum of 5 years’ experience in Supply Base Management
	A PGD in Logistics & Supply Chain Management is an added advantage.
	Customer Relationship, Supply Chain and Warehouse Management
	Skilled in the use of Microsoft Excel, PowerPoint, Word & Outlook
	Stakeholder and Interface Management
	CILT or any relevant certification is an added advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV as an attachment to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

2.) Lead Coding Analyst

Job Locations: Port - Harcourt - Rivers and Lagos
Employment Type: Contract

Purpose of Coding Supervision


	Coding supervision ensures that items are assigned standardized codes (e.g., SKU, part numbers, barcodes), which helps to avoid duplication of records, maintain uniform naming conventions and facilitate easy identification and classification of items.


Detailed Responsibilities


	Oversee coding operations and ensure adherence to coding standards.
	Review and analyse complex coding cases and ensure accuracy in code assignment.
	Maintain updated documentation of workflows and coding guidelines.
	Supervise and mentor junior coding analysts or programmers.
	Ensures accurate classification and coding of materials in inventory systems to support procurement, inventory management, and reporting.
	Create, update, and maintain material codes in ERP systems (e.g., SAP).
	Ensure consistency and accuracy of material descriptions and attributes.
	Apply industry - standard coding systems (e.g. Internal taxonomy).
	Coordinate team schedules, workload distribution, and performance reviews.
	Provide training and in - service education on coding practices and tools.
	Conduct audits and coding reviews to ensure compliance with regulatory standards
	Resolve discrepancies in coding and billing documentation.
	Ensure data integrity and accuracy for billing and reporting purposes.
	Serve as a point of contact for coding - related queries and system issues.
	Collaborate with software developers for system testing and maintenance.
	Generate and reconcile coding reports.
	Supervise and mentor coding staff.
	Manage workload distribution, performance evaluations, and training.
	Foster a collaborative and accountable team culture


Educational Qualification and Certifications


	Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Supply Chain Management, Inventory Management, Engineering, Business Management or related fields.
	5 - 7 years of progressive coding or programming experience and Inventory Management.
	Strong knowledge of coding systems, and project management.


Desired Competencies:


	Advanced knowledge of coding systems such as SAP
	Experience with coding platforms (e.g., SAP and data analytics tools.
	Write reports, deliver presentations, and lead training sessions.
	Oversee coding operations and workflow optimization.
	Lead initiatives for process improvement and system upgrades.
	Coordinate with IT teams for testing and maintenance of coding systems.
	Stay updated with coding updates and regulatory changes.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

3.) Inventory Analyst Lead / Stock Auditor Supervisor

Job Locations: Warri - Delta, Port - Harcourt - Rivers and Lagos
Employment Type: Renewable Annual Contract

Responsibilities


	Develop and implement the annual stock audit plan covering all company storage locations, including third - party warehouses.
	Conduct planned and ad hoc stock audits to verify that physical inventory aligns with system records (SAP).
	Investigate discrepancies between physical stock and system data, identifying root causes and recommending corrective actions.
	Ensure compliance with company policies, procedures, and industry standards in inventory management.
	Prepare detailed audit reports highlighting findings, discrepancies, risks, and improvement opportunities.
	Analyse inventory data to detect trends, variances, and areas for operational enhancement.
	Ensure adherence to internal controls and regulatory requirements.
	Monitor high - risk areas such as obsolete, damaged, or slow - moving inventory.
	Collaborate with warehouse and supply base teams to strengthen stock auditing processes and controls.
	Identify and report obsolete, rusted, expired, damaged, or leaking materials for preservation or refurbishment.
	Highlight surplus materials not yet coded into SAP for mass upload and proper tracking.
	Detect and report weak warehousing practices that may lead to pilferage or fraud.
	Recommend process improvements to enhance inventory accuracy and reduce replenishment costs.
	Recommend improvements to inventory management systems and processes based on audit findings.
	Collaborate with IT and operations to implement changes that enhance accuracy and efficiency.
	Lead and train audit teams on procedures and best practices.
	Monitor performance and provide feedback to improve audit quality.
	Communicate findings and recommendations to senior management.
	Work with cross - functional teams to resolve issues and implement corrective actions.


Qualifications & Educational Background


	Bachelor’s degree or HND in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
	Professional certifications such as ICAN or ACCA are an added advantage.
	Certifications in asset management or supply chain (e.g., CSCP, CPIM) are advantageous.


Experience:


	7 - 10 years of experience in Inventory Management, Auditing, or Supply Chain Roles.
	Hands - on experience with ERP systems like SAP.


Core Competencies:


	Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret audit results and inventory data.
	High ethical standards and impartiality in audit execution and reporting.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel (including pivot tables, VLOOKUP) and inventory software.
	Ability to clearly document and communicate audit findings to both technical and non - technical stakeholders.
	Skilled in investigating and resolving stock discrepancies.
	Understanding of inventory workflows and control procedures.
	Efficient in planning and executing audits within defined timelines.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Vacancies at Union Bank of Nigeria
content:
Union Bank of Nigeria ("UBN") was established in 1917 and is one of Nigeria’s long-standing and most respected financial institutions, offering a portfolio of banking services to individuals, SMEs, commercial and corporate clients. With a robust geographical network comprising more than 300 service centres and over 950+ ATMs spread across Nigeria, we have remained committed to helping individuals, families and businesses grow for nearly a century.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Unit Head, Regulatory Reporting (AM-DM)

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-time

Requirements
     

            
    




	Bachelor’s Degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field
	Relevant professional certifications (e.g., ACA, ACCA, CFA) are an advantage
	Proven experience in a similar role within the financial services industry
	Strong analytical skills and attention to detail
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Officer, Tax Management (ET-ABO)

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field
	Relevant professional certifications (e.g., ACA, ACCA, CFA) are an advantage
	Proven experience in a similar role within the financial services industry
	Strong analytical skills and attention to detail
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

3.) Finance Product Control (BO-SBO)

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field
	Relevant professional certifications (e.g., ACA, ACCA, CFA) are an advantage
	Proven experience in a similar role within the financial services industry
	Strong analytical skills and attention to detail
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

4.) Officer, Finance Performance Management (SBO-AM)

Job Location: Lagos
Job Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field
	Relevant professional certifications (e.g., ACA, ACCA, CFA) are an advantage
	Proven experience in a similar role within the financial services industry
	Strong analytical skills and attention to detail
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "MMT Consults - Our client, Eliana Oni Enterprise, is seeking to recruit suitably qualified candidates for the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Kubwa, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking a creative, results - driven, and highly skilled Social Media Manager to lead the company&#39;s digital presence and brand positioning across all social media platforms.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing and executing innovative social media strategies, creating compelling content, growing online communities, increasing brand awareness, generating qualified leads, and driving profitable sales through digital channels, particularly Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, and Google platforms.


Key Responsibilities
Social Media Strategy &amp; Brand Positioning:


	Develop and implement a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with the company&#39;s marketing and sales objectives.
	Position Eliana Oni Enterprise as a leading and trusted brand within its industry.
	Build and maintain a consistent brand voice, identity, and messaging across all digital platforms.
	Monitor industry trends, competitor activities, and emerging social media opportunities.


Content Creation &amp; Management:


	Create engaging, high - quality, and conversion - focused content, including graphics, videos, reels, stories, carousels, blogs, and promotional campaigns.
	Develop and manage a monthly content calendar.
	Coordinate product launches, promotional campaigns, and seasonal marketing initiatives.
	Ensure all content aligns with brand standards and business goals.


Community Engagement &amp; Audience Growth:


	Manage daily interactions across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Google Business Profile, and other relevant platforms.
	Respond promptly to inquiries, comments, reviews, and customer feedback.
	Build and nurture a loyal online community through consistent engagement.
	Collaborate with influencers, content creators, and brand ambassadors to increase visibility and reach.


Digital Marketing &amp; Sales Growth:


	Plan and execute social media advertising campaigns to generate leads and increase sales.
	Develop strategies that convert followers into paying customers.
	Optimize content and campaigns to maximize return on investment (ROI).
	Support customer acquisition and retention initiatives through digital channels.


Analytics &amp; Performance Monitoring:


	Track, analyze, and report on social media performance metrics, including engagement, reach, follower growth, website traffic, leads, and sales conversions.
	Use insights and analytics to refine strategies and improve campaign performance.
	Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports for management.


Google &amp; Online Presence Management:


	Manage and optimize the company&#39;s Google Business Profile.
	Monitor and respond to customer reviews.
	Support search visibility initiatives through content optimization and local digital marketing efforts.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualification with 1 - 2 years of experience.


Salary
N150,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates who meets the recruitment requirements can send application to: mmtconsults@gmail.com using the Job Position as subject of the mail.",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "MMT Consults"
    
  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }

      "maxValue": 250000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }

Social Media Manager Job at MMT Consults




        
    

        
        MMT Consults - Our client, Eliana Oni Enterprise, is seeking to recruit suitably qualified candidates for the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Kubwa, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	Our client is seeking a creative, results - driven, and highly skilled Social Media Manager to lead the company's digital presence and brand positioning across all social media platforms.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing and executing innovative social media strategies, creating compelling content, growing online communities, increasing brand awareness, generating qualified leads, and driving profitable sales through digital channels, particularly Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, and Google platforms.


Key Responsibilities
Social Media Strategy & Brand Positioning:


	Develop and implement a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with the company's marketing and sales objectives.
	Position Eliana Oni Enterprise as a leading and trusted brand within its industry.
	Build and maintain a consistent brand voice, identity, and messaging across all digital platforms.
	Monitor industry trends, competitor activities, and emerging social media opportunities.


Content Creation & Management:


	Create engaging, high - quality, and conversion - focused content, including graphics, videos, reels, stories, carousels, blogs, and promotional campaigns.
	Develop and manage a monthly content calendar.
	Coordinate product launches, promotional campaigns, and seasonal marketing initiatives.
	Ensure all content aligns with brand standards and business goals.


Community Engagement & Audience Growth:


	Manage daily interactions across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Google Business Profile, and other relevant platforms.
	Respond promptly to inquiries, comments, reviews, and customer feedback.
	Build and nurture a loyal online community through consistent engagement.
	Collaborate with influencers, content creators, and brand ambassadors to increase visibility and reach.


Digital Marketing & Sales Growth:


	Plan and execute social media advertising campaigns to generate leads and increase sales.
	Develop strategies that convert followers into paying customers.
	Optimize content and campaigns to maximize return on investment (ROI).
	Support customer acquisition and retention initiatives through digital channels.


Analytics & Performance Monitoring:


	Track, analyze, and report on social media performance metrics, including engagement, reach, follower growth, website traffic, leads, and sales conversions.
	Use insights and analytics to refine strategies and improve campaign performance.
	Prepare weekly and monthly performance reports for management.


Google & Online Presence Management:


	Manage and optimize the company's Google Business Profile.
	Monitor and respond to customer reviews.
	Support search visibility initiatives through content optimization and local digital marketing efforts.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualification with 1 - 2 years of experience.


Salary
N150,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates who meets the recruitment requirements can send application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
